title: Lucky Coin Familiar
bio: Copper Winkworth is a lucky coin familiar who rolls toward anyone having a gloomy day. He feels cheerful, jingles when proud, and sleeps inside a sock drawer crown.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a large circle for the coin. Add a smaller circle inside for the raised rim.
steps.hint: Do not worry about perfect circles; a wobbly coin feels handmade.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, draw one open eye and one winking eye. Add a lifted eyebrow and a tiny happy grin.
steps.hint: A wink makes Copper look like he knows a lucky secret.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add a small star stamp, tiny rim marks, cheek dots, and a few jingle lines beside the coin.
steps.hint: Rim marks can be short little dashes around part of the edge.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the outer coin, inner rim, face, star stamp, rim marks, cheeks, and jingle lines.
steps.hint: Leave some rim marks out if the edge starts to feel too busy.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the coin, star, cheeks, and rim. Add a soft shadow under one side and a bright highlight on the top edge.
steps.hint: A small highlight makes Copper feel shiny and lucky.
